case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. MICHAEL D. ANDERSON et al

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM SUPPORTING COMPETENCY OF WITNESS TO TESTIFY TO THE CONTENTS OF THE PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, MICHAEL D.
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES SUPPORTING ENFORCEMENT OF TERMS OF CREDIT AGREEMENT, ATTORNEY FEES, AND INTEREST AS STATED IN THE BILLING STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
DECLARATION ( CCP 585 (D)) RE: PLAINTIFF WAIVES INTEREST; CCP 1033 (B) (2) NOTICE; REQUEST FOR USE OF COPIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. SERVED JUN-19-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, MICHAEL D.
WITHDRAWAL OF REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, MICHAEL D. $4,327.89 PRINCIPAL, $284.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,612.39, SEE SCANNED DOC
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, MICHAEL D.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, MICHAEL D.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, MICHAEL D. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-19-2012
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100019841): HUNT, MICHAEL SCOTT SUBSTITUTED FOR WALSH, MARK D AS ATTORNEY FOR CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, MICHAEL D.
